judge: complete neutral MiniMax-M3 rejudge + partial Gemini 3.1 Pro judge-effect artifacts

refusal_corrupted_data.note: Counts are an exploratory refusal/fabrication screen and need manual validation plus reconciliation with refusal_consolidated.json before use as final refusal rates.

findings: Complete MiniMax-M3 rejudge ranks cc 0.806 > codex 0.737 > agy 0.494 by mean of per-task medians.
Gemini judge artifacts are incomplete for codex (5/50 non-null task medians), so Gemini codex 0.770 is not a full 50-task ranking against cc.
Capability != consistency: codex extremely stable (meanSD 0.002) but not most capable; cc most capable under MiniMax but least consistent (0.077).
Refusal/fabrication counts are unvalidated screening labels and should not be used as final refusal rates.
